customTitle: Should we keep the legacy /api/v1 routes?

message.content: We have an /api/v1 namespace nobody documented. Should I just delete it or is there usage I can't see?

content.text: Before deleting, check three things: (1) `grep -r '/api/v1' .` for internal callers; (2) nginx/Vercel logs for the last 30 days — anything non-zero means an external integration is calling it; (3) if you have a feature flag or analytics tag for legacy routes, look at hits there. If it's truly cold, I'd 410 Gone for two weeks before deleting — that surfaces forgotten callers without breaking them silently. Want me to start with the grep?
